zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Boteler於大約1252年出生在英國藍卡爾時，他的父親William le Boteler25歲，母親Dionysia Lostock19歲。他和Isabel le Boteler至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1277年享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Boteler于大约1252年出生在英国藍卡爾时，他的父亲William le Boteler25岁，母亲Dionysia Lostock19岁。他和Isabel le Boteler至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1277年享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Boteler was born about 1252, in Lancashire, England, his father, William le Boteler, was 25 and his mother, Dionysia Lostock, was 19. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Isabel le Boteler. He died about 1277, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Boteler est né environ 1252, à Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William le Boteler, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Dionysia Lostock, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Isabel le Boteler. Il est décédé environ 1277, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Boteler um 1252 in Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William le Boteler 25 und seine Mutter Dionysia Lostock 19. Er hatte mit Isabel le Boteler mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1277 im Alter von 27 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Boteler è nato il circa 1252 nel Lancashire, England, il suo padre, William le Boteler, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Dionysia Lostock, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Isabel le Boteler. Morì circa 1277, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Botelerが約1252年にイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父William le Botelerは25歳，母Dionysia Lostockは19歳であった。彼はIsabel le Botelerとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1277年に27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Boteler(이)가 대략 1252년 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William le Boteler(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Dionysia Lostock(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Isabel le Boteler(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1277년 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1252–about 1277: tany ho any amin'ny 1252–tany ho any amin'ny 1277

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Boteler nasceu aproximadamente 1252, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William le Boteler, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Dionysia Lostock, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Isabel le Boteler. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1277, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Boteler родился около 1252 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William le Boteler было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Dionysia Lostock, 19. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Isabel le Boteler. Он умер около 1277 г. в возрасте 27 лет.

sm.about 1252–about 1277: e tusa o le 1252–e tusa o le 1277

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Boteler nació aproximadamente 1252, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William le Boteler, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Dionysia Lostock, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Isabel le Boteler. Murió aproximadamente 1277, a la edad de 27 años.
